name: microsoft-dataverse
description: Reads Microsoft Dataverse accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, and users through the Web API.

risk.read: external Microsoft Dataverse Web API read of CRM records

conformance.reason: Every stream is StreamHook-handled (hooks/microsoft-dataverse/hooks.go ports legacy's @odata.nextLink absolute-URL harvest loop verbatim; the engine's declarative next_url_path pagination reads its cursor via connsdk.StringAt's dotted-path parser, which cannot address the literal dotted key "@odata.nextLink" at all — see docs.md's Streams notes). hook-covered; proven live by internal/connectors/paritytest/microsoft-dataverse (TestParityMicrosoftDataverse_AccountsNextLinkPagination) and internal/connectors/hooks/microsoft-dataverse/hooks_test.go.
